module_info.docstring:
CLI flag presets for token-saving defaults.

Presets expand into multiple flags, reducing cognitive load from 6+ flags to 1.
Names describe output shape (compact/minimal) not intensity (efficient/aggressive).

functions.name: resolve_auto_session_id
functions.docstring: Generate a stable session ID from CLAUDE_SESSION_ID env var or CWD+HEAD hash.

functions.name: apply_preset
functions.docstring: Apply preset defaults to parsed args. Explicit flags take precedence. Mutates args in-place.

functions.name: emit_preset_hint
functions.docstring: Emit stderr hint when context/diff-context run without --preset.
